name: Contango ORE, Inc.
description: Contango ORE, Inc. is a Houston-based gold exploration and development company. The company's primary focus is on the Manh Choh project in Alaska, which is being developed in partnership with Peak Gold, LLC, a joint venture with Kinross Gold Corporation. Contango ORE is dedicated to exploring and developing high-grade gold and mineral deposits in Alaska, utilizing a low-capital-intensity model to bring projects into production.
